results.description: Gujarat Titans batter Sai Sudharsan experienced a rare hit-wicket dismissal twice in consecutive IPL matches. This unusual event occurred during Qualifier 2 against Rajasthan Royals. Despite this setback, Gujarat Titans secured a seven-wicket victory. Skipper Shubman Gill expressed surprise at the repeated dismissal. Gujarat Titans will now face Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the final.
